requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger s[i]} | 0 <= i < |s| :: s[i] != v
forall i: int {:trigger s[i]} | 0 <= i < |s| :: s[i] != v

ensures.text: forall i: int, j: int {:trigger s[j], s[i]} | 0 <= i < j < |s| :: s[i] < s[j]
forall i: int, j: int {:trigger s[j], s[i]} | 0 <= i < j < |s| :: s[i] < s[j]

invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger sorted[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: sorted[j] < val

assertions.text: forall j: int {:trigger sorted[j]} | i <= j < |sorted| :: sorted[j] >= val
